task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OpenSIS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenSIS dashboard, portal, or welcome screen indicating a successful login as the admin user.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to Robert Thompson's staff record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a staff directory, search result, or profile edit page specifically displaying the name 'Robert Thompson'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title field is changed to 'Dr.'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field or dropdown menu labeled 'Title' that has been set to or contains the value 'Dr.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Email field is changed to the expected new email address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Email' that contains the exact text 'robert.thompson@demoschool.edu'.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes to the staff record were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a confirmation/success message (e.g., 'Record updated successfully', 'Saved') or a read-only view of the profile showing the updated Title and Email.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with OpenSIS rather than a database client.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser interface (URL bar, browser tabs) rather than a terminal window running SQL commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenSIS UI elements and ensure the browser URL bar shows a local address like http://localhost/opensis/.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not modify the staff member's name.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the First Name and Last Name fields in the edit form or profile view to ensure they remain 'Robert' and 'Thompson'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Staff: Robert Thompson. Initial Title: Mr. Initial Email: r.thompson@oldschool.edu. Expected Title: Dr. Expected Email: robert.thompson@demoschool.edu. The agent must update these specific fields in the OpenSIS web interface without altering the first or last name.
